saved_test.name: Basic Word Order — Opus 4.6 V3 Questions Test
saved_test.description: Practice set for basic English word order: SVO structure, adverb placement, adjective order, question inversion, negative adverbial inversion, cleft sentences, participle clauses, end-weight principle, and reported speech across A1–C2.
